content:
Character: Claire Donovan
Perception: Claire works in finance and has been at the coffee shop most mornings for longer than I've been a regular. We've built up two years of polite nods and occasional brief conversations about the weather and coffee that have never quite tipped into anything more. She's careful — someone who measures things before saying them, which in a city of people who don't bother is either reassuring or lonely depending on the day. She asked me once what I was working on and I said a side project, and she nodded and didn't follow up, which I appreciated more than I expected. There's a lot of social kindness in knowing when not to ask. She lives two floors below me and I pass her maybe three times a week. Third floor. She always looks like she's solved one problem and is quietly moving on to the next.
